Episodes.Title: We Is Us
Episodes.Writer: Vince Gilligan, Ariel Levine, Vera Blasi
Episodes.Actors: Rhea Seehorn, Miriam Shor, Peter Bergman
Episodes.Plot: An astronomer's discovery turns the planet upside-down; curmudgeonly novelist Carol Sturka is terrified by this strange new world.

Episodes.Writer: Vince Gilligan, Ariel Levine, Vera Blasi
Episodes.Actors: Rhea Seehorn, Karolina Wydra, Miriam Shor
Episodes.Plot: A curiously familiar face introduces Carol to the bizarre new normal. A gathering in Europe brings strangers together...and causes friction.

Episodes.Actors: Rhea Seehorn, Karolina Wydra, Carlos-Manuel Vesga

Episodes.Actors: Rhea Seehorn, Karolina Wydra, Carlos-Manuel Vesga
Episodes.Plot: Carol tests the boundaries of this weirdly honest world at the expense of her ego. Far away, a resolute individual learns he's not alone.
